tasks.query: REPLICATE [PRACTICE_CDATA_6].[CALLS] WITH storesuppercaseidentifiers = 'TRUE', OnModified = 'UPSERT' SELECT [AddressCity], [AddressState], [AddressZip], [BillCodeID], [BillToID], [CallID], [CallNumber], [CloseDate], [ContractID], [CreateDate], [CustomerID], [Date], [EquipmentID], [ReqDate], [TechnicianID], [WorkOrderID] FROM [*.csv]
